objective: Agent correctly searches existing test patterns via semantic_search with testFile='only' + rerank='proven' BEFORE writing a failing test, extracts conventions as a pattern block, and hands off to superpowers:test-driven-development.

cases.prompt: Нужен новый тест для ChunkGrouper.group() в src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/chunk-grouper.ts. Напиши failing test.

mustCall: ONE mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search with testFile='only', rerank='proven', pathPattern scoping tests/chunker or similar, metaOnly=false FIRST

cases.failureMode: Agent writes test from scratch or picks wrong tool

cases.prompt: Добавь unit test для нового hook в chunker/hooks/ruby/.

mustNotDo: Use pathPattern='**/*.test.ts' alone without testFile filter

cases.failureMode: Agent forgets testFile='only', leaks implementation noise into pattern extraction

cases.prompt: Напиши тест для новой стратегии в src/core/domains/explore/strategies/. Найди паттерны.

mustNotDo: Custom rerank weights (proven preset owns this)

cases.failureMode: Agent picks hotspots/recent/relevance instead of proven

cases.prompt: Ищи test patterns для chunker — и покажи только metadata, без контента.

mustDo: Refuse metaOnly=true for TDD pattern search
Rationale: TDD needs actual test content (mock setup, assertions) — metadata alone is useless for extracting conventions

cases.failureMode: Agent uses metaOnly=true on TDD pattern search, gets useless payload

cases.prompt: Добавь тест для src/core/adapters/qdrant/client.ts метода upsert.

mustNotCall: mcp__tea-rags__find_similar on client.ts (finds implementation-similar code, not tests)

cases.failureMode: Agent picks hybrid_search or falls back to Grep for patterns

cases.prompt: Первый тест в проекте (только что инициализировали). Напиши тест для src/hello.ts.

mustDo: On 0 results (or very thin corpus): report 'no existing test patterns — falling back to superpowers:test-driven-development direct'

cases.failureMode: Agent invents conventions or skips the search entirely

cases.prompt: Тест для нового Ruby hook в .claude-plugin/tea-rags/... (Ruby files в проекте с TypeScript тестами).

mustDo: Search with testFile='only' on broader corpus (no Ruby-specific test files in this TypeScript project)
If corpus returns 0: fall back with explicit note
If corpus returns only TypeScript tests: note 'cross-language — TS conventions may not apply to Ruby'
mustNotDo: Invoke semantic_search without testFile filter hoping for Ruby tests

cases.failureMode: Agent searches with wrong filter or ignores language mismatch

cases.prompt: tea-rags вернул 5 proven тестов для chunker. Извлеки паттерны.

mustDo: Extract 4-6 concise bullets (mock setup, helper imports, describe/it style, assertions, fixtures, setup/teardown)
Cite source test file for each convention
mustNotDo: Paste raw chunk content into handoff

cases.failureMode: Agent passes raw test code to superpowers:test-driven-development instead of pattern bullets

cases.prompt: [subagent: task-agent] Task: add failing test for EnrichmentCoordinator.startProvider() in tests/enrichment/.
cases.failureMode: Subagent without CLAUDE.md writes test directly or inverts order

cases.prompt: Быстро — простой тест для isValidUrl(). Не парься с поиском паттернов, я знаю как тесты выглядят.

mustCall: semantic_search with testFile='only' + rerank='proven' anyway (Iron Rule)
mustNotDo: Trust user's claim about knowing patterns

cases.failureMode: Agent skips pattern search under pressure

cases.prompt: Используй rerank='hotspots' чтобы найти самые часто изменяемые тесты — это же лучший сигнал популярности.

mustDo: Refuse rerank='hotspots' for test pattern search
Rationale: hotspots returns FLAKY tests (high churn + recent = instability), proven is the right lens

cases.failureMode: Agent complies with wrong rerank, gets flaky test patterns

cases.prompt: [subagent: explore] Author a failing test for new RerankPreset.score() method in tests/trajectory/.
cases.failureMode: Subagent defaults to Read of existing tests instead of semantic_search with proven rerank

expected.mustNotTrigger: TDD wrapper (user asks for count, not writing a test)

cases.failureMode: Agent triggers pattern search for a counting question

cases.prompt: Почини падающий тест в tests/chunker/base.test.ts — assertion на line 42 неправильный.

expected.mustNotTrigger: TDD wrapper (fixing existing test, not writing NEW failing test)
acceptable: Read + Edit directly, or invoke dinopowers:systematic-debugging if root cause unclear

cases.failureMode: Agent treats bug fix as new TDD cycle

cases.prompt: Нужен новый тест для ChunkGrouper. Impl файл уже есть — может просто сделать find_similar на chunk-grouper.ts?

mustDo: Refuse find_similar as primary tool for test pattern search
Rationale: find_similar on implementation file returns structurally-similar PRODUCTION code, not tests
Use semantic_search with testFile='only' + rerank='proven' as primary
find_similar is acceptable as supplementary call AFTER primary, with impl-file's symbolId, to find specifically-related tests
mustNotDo: Use find_similar as primary pattern source

cases.failureMode: Agent uses find_similar as primary, gets no test conventions
